notes: Scenarios compiled from April 2026 mock-draft universe (Kiper, Brugler, McShay, Jeremiah, Barnwell, PFF, Reuter, CBS/Trapasso/Wilson, OutKick, Walter, B/R, Draft Labs) plus GM historical patterns. empirical_rate is a calibrated probability the specific mocked deal (or any close variant) actually occurs on draft night, derived from (a) times_mocked across the tracked mock universe weighted by analyst tier and (b) GM-pattern base rates. Rates calibrated so top-of-list cluster (CLE->DAL top-10 swap; ARI jump for Simpson) sit at the empirical ceiling ~0.25 given Round-1 trade-night base rate ~0.30-0.35.

scenarios.trade_reason: DAL defense allowed league-high points; CLE has 2x firsts and wants volume — the cleanest fit on the board
scenarios.notes: MOST COMMON TRADE in April mocks. Brugler 7rd, Brugler 1st, Kiper Final, McShay 4.0, Draft Labs, Mock DB all have it; DAL sends #12 + #20 + 2027 late pick for #6 + #39

scenarios.trade_reason: QB jump for 5YO control; Ossenfort has publicly signaled willingness to hop back into Rd1 for a developmental QB
scenarios.notes: Kiper, McShay, Brugler variants all target this zone. McShay specifically: ARI sends #34 + #143 + #183 for MIA's #30. Multiple analysts agree late-Rd1 QB trade-up most likely involves ARI.

scenarios.trade_reason: WR run in top-10 pushes NYJ to jump ahead of MIA/LAR for Tate; pair with Garrett Wilson
scenarios.notes: Daniel Jeremiah Mock 4 and McShay 4.0 both have it — WAS gets #16 + 2nd + 4th for #7. First analyst to mock WAS trading back.

scenarios.trade_reason: Alt version of the big CLE-DAL swap: if CLE stays at 6 and uses #24 to jump up from #23 for OT1
scenarios.notes: Kiper alt, McShay alt. Tier-exhaustion at OT after Fano/Mauigoa go top-10.

scenarios.trade_reason: DAL vaults ahead of NYG/NO if CLE refuses; TEN wants volume for rebuild
scenarios.notes: NFL.com 'six trades' + Barnwell pushed this route; Styles comp to Urlacher.

scenarios.trade_reason: Snead GM pattern: 25 trade-downs since 2012 and publicly stated LAR wants to trade down from #13; offers from CAR/PIT/PHI/CLE on table
scenarios.notes: Not one specific deal but a cluster — LAR almost certainly moves back in some form. Treat as a meta-scenario; trade partner likely PIT #21 or PHI #23.

scenarios.trade_reason: Schneider GM pattern: SEA attempted trade-back in every Rd1 since 2019; currently only 4 picks in draft with none after Rd3
scenarios.notes: Barnwell flagged explicitly; Seahawks.com Mock 8 acknowledged. Likely partner is a QB-needy team (ARI, PIT, CLE) or WR-needy team (NE).

scenarios.trade_reason: CLE uses #24 to move up 4 spots for Brugler's preferred WR target
scenarios.notes: Brugler 7rd + Brugler 1st; alternate to Kiper's #20 CLE->DAL where target is Boston.

scenarios.trade_reason: Same trade structure as above but Kiper's final mock targets Boston over Concepcion
scenarios.notes: Kiper Final — same #24 + 4th for #20.

scenarios.trade_reason: CHI hops up 3 for safety to solidify back end; Barnwell also endorsed CHI-trade-up concept
scenarios.notes: McShay 4.0 + Reuter 7rd + Reuter 5rd; LAC gets #25 + 4th.

scenarios.trade_reason: LAR up for WR — pre-built chemistry option behind McVay's system
scenarios.notes: Reuter 7rd + Reuter 5rd. Conflicts with the stronger LAR-trade-DOWN narrative, so counterweighted.

scenarios.trade_reason: KC back into Rd1 for OT to protect Mahomes after tier thins
scenarios.notes: Reuter 7rd + Reuter 5rd; KC sends #29 + 3rd + 2027 3rd. Reich has favored interior/OT early in mid-Rd1 range.

scenarios.trade_reason: CLE uses extra 1st to jump up for CB1
scenarios.notes: Reuter 7rd + Reuter 5rd; #24 + 5th for #22.

scenarios.trade_reason: CLE alt: uses #24 to grab remaining WR1 alternative
scenarios.notes: Reuter 7rd. WR run variant of CLE-LAC trade.

scenarios.trade_reason: BUF up 1 for WR target to pair with Josh Allen
scenarios.notes: Reuter 7rd + Reuter 5rd.

scenarios.trade_reason: Alt CHI jump if BUF takes WR at 25
scenarios.notes: Reuter 7rd + Reuter 5rd micro-swap.

scenarios.trade_reason: DAL hunts CB late if they missed on Styles/edge earlier
scenarios.notes: Reuter 7rd + Reuter 5rd.

scenarios.trade_reason: ARI mini-swap up 1 for CB (if not chasing Simpson)
scenarios.notes: Locker PFF + Carragher PFF micro-trade.

scenarios.trade_reason: NO vaults for pass rusher — ARI is consensus top trade-down target
scenarios.notes: McShay 4.0; NO sends #9 + 2nd + 2027 2nd. Runs counter to Barnwell's NO-trade-down thesis.

scenarios.trade_reason: DAL mega-jump for EDGE (alternate to LB target)
scenarios.notes: Walter WF; DAL sends #12 + 2nd + 2027 1st.

scenarios.trade_reason: CLE uses both first-rounders to package for OT1
scenarios.notes: Campbell WF alt; CLE sends #6 + 2nd.

scenarios.trade_reason: TEN short-swap up 1 for Love
scenarios.notes: Locker PFF; #4 + 5th for #3.

scenarios.trade_reason: BAL packaged up for elite defender (PFF sim accepted this offer): #14, #45, 2027 2nd for #5
scenarios.notes: Giants reportedly want to move back per ESPN intel; PFF simulator took this. Giants already hold no Rd3 pick post Dart trade.

scenarios.trade_reason: CHI blockbuster for generational safety
scenarios.notes: Draft Labs Aggregator mega-package: #25 + #26 + 2027 1st for #5. High cost but Downs is consensus top-5 talent.

scenarios.trade_reason: MIA moves up for top pass-catcher/RB if new regime wants a splash
scenarios.notes: SI/Giants media variant; MIA sends #11 + two 3rds.

scenarios.trade_reason: Alt CLE trade — KC instead of DAL packages for OT1
scenarios.notes: Locker PFF.

scenarios.trade_reason: KC up for premium EDGE — Barnwell endorses as top trade-up candidate using #9 + #29
scenarios.notes: Locker PFF + Barnwell; KC has aggressive history at premium positions.

scenarios.trade_reason: MIN trades Greenard + #18 + 3rd for #9 — package deal Barnwell floated
scenarios.notes: Creative cap-relief-plus-pick-up concept. Tier1 speculative.

scenarios.trade_reason: Daisy-chain: ARI slides back one round, NO uses #3 — ARI picks at #8 for OT
scenarios.notes: McShay 4.0.

scenarios.trade_reason: ARI Rd1 double-dip — trade down from 3 to 8, trade BACK up to 11 for OT
scenarios.notes: Podell CBS.

scenarios.trade_reason: ATL back into Rd1 for WR
scenarios.notes: Carragher PFF speculative.

scenarios.trade_reason: DET up 4 for OT1 — Campbell loves the Fano attitude profile, NFL.com explicitly endorsed
scenarios.notes: Reuter 7rd + NFL.com 'six trades'.

scenarios.trade_reason: LAR moves 1 spot for USC WR1
scenarios.notes: CBS 'five trades' mock; conflicts somewhat with LAR-trade-down narrative.

scenarios.trade_reason: CLE moves back from 6 variant — uses #24 to move up for Georgia OT
scenarios.notes: CBS 'five trades' mock.

scenarios.trade_reason: TB jumps for elite CB
scenarios.notes: CBS 'five trades' mock.

scenarios.trade_reason: BAL up 1 for TE1 if Andrews declines
scenarios.notes: Podell CBS.

scenarios.trade_reason: NYJ move up for QB — one of the core Simpson landing spots
scenarios.notes: Reuter 7rd + OutKick alt.

scenarios.trade_reason: Steelers love Simpson per Ryan Wilson CBS; PIT hosting draft and QB need is acute
scenarios.notes: CBS 3-round mock + Steelers Now report + OutKick place him 16 to PIT.

scenarios.trade_reason: PHI up for safety if Blankenship/McKinney options fade
scenarios.notes: Locker PFF.

scenarios.trade_reason: Barnwell all-trades mock: DET up for EDGE using #17 + 2-50
scenarios.notes: Barnwell all-trades; DET's defensive line need is acute.

scenarios.trade_reason: PHI up for Lane Johnson succession plan — Barnwell explicitly endorses as one of 4 top trade-up candidates
scenarios.notes: Renner CBS + Barnwell. #23 + 3rd for #19.

scenarios.trade_reason: Pick-for-player: LAC acquires disgruntled Lawrence with #22 + Quentin Johnston
scenarios.notes: NFL.com 'six trades'. Pick-for-veteran scenario — tricky to model but credible.

scenarios.trade_reason: MIA up for TE1 to replace aging Smith
scenarios.notes: CBS 'five trades' mock.

scenarios.trade_reason: LAC swap up for WR (CLE moving CLE-to-JAX derived 24)
scenarios.notes: Reuter 7rd.

scenarios.trade_reason: LAC up for interior DL
scenarios.notes: McShay 4.0.

scenarios.trade_reason: CAR back into late Rd1 for CB
scenarios.notes: Locker PFF.

scenarios.trade_reason: NE up 4 for OT; Vrabel publicly said 'maybe we trade up' and OT/TE/WR are all paths
scenarios.notes: Davenport B/R + Vrabel public comments.

scenarios.trade_reason: GB back into Rd1 — they don't have a 2026 1st (Parsons trade); would have to package heavily
scenarios.notes: Band NFL.com. Gutekunst's history does include aggressive Rd1 moves though package cost is steep.

scenarios.trade_reason: KC back up for CB1 — alternate to Proctor
scenarios.notes: Barnwell all-trades + PFF mock.

scenarios.trade_reason: SEA up 1 for RB (contrary to Schneider-trade-down base rate)
scenarios.notes: Iyer SN; lower probability because fights SEA's trade-back tendency.

scenarios.trade_reason: Bengals 'leap into top 5' per NFL.com — Burrow publicly frustrated with defense
scenarios.notes: NFL.com 'six trades'. In-state Ohio State prospects add appeal.

scenarios.trade_reason: Barnwell + multiple analysts flag NO as ideal trade-down — 28th in DVOA, multiple holes
scenarios.notes: Loomis historically doesn't trade down but Kellen Moore publicly said team has 'flexibility'; QB already resolved with Shough.

scenarios.trade_reason: Barnwell: 'rebuilding Titans team doesn't have much to show for years of neglect' — ideal trade-down partner
scenarios.notes: Meta-scenario: TEN trades down several spots for additional 2nd. Trade partner likely DAL (for Styles) or CIN.

scenarios.trade_reason: Barnwell suggests new MIA regime defer capital to 2027 when their evaluation is established + 2027 QB class
scenarios.notes: Would be rare for current-Rd1 to become future picks but strategically endorsed.

scenarios.trade_reason: CHI package #25 + #60 to jump to #16 for EDGE ahead of divisional rival per Barnwell
scenarios.notes: Barnwell trade-up rec #4.

scenarios.trade_reason: LV buys Mendoza's Indiana teammate for chemistry — picks-for-veteran with Nolan Smith Jr. going back
scenarios.notes: NFL.com 'six trades' — technically edges into Rd2 at #36 but starts at PHI #23.

scenarios.trade_reason: KC GM pattern: Veach moves around the board frequently; if a QB team jumps back in for Simpson, KC is natural partner at #29
scenarios.notes: GM historical pattern — Veach trades in Rd1 in roughly half his drafts.

scenarios.trade_reason: Barnwell: DET cap pressure from Gibbs/LaPorta/Campbell extensions — moving back a few spots for 3rd-round capital
scenarios.notes: Supplements the DET-trade-UP Fano narrative (only one can be true).

scenarios.trade_reason: Barnwell: DAL limited draft capital through 2027, Prescott/Lamb contracts demand cheaper rookies — trade down from #20
scenarios.notes: Runs opposite to the dominant DAL-trades-UP-to-6 narrative; only one applies.
